channel.title: Customer Service on prasanthabr
channel.description: Recent content in Customer Service on prasanthabr

item.title: My Mom's Siemens Dish Washer Stories and why German doesnt spell quality in India
item.description: tl;dr Our experience with a Siemens Dishwasher and why German may not be the best bet in India. Certainly Siemens with their support’s sense of humour is not the path to tread. UPDATE: Siemens says they will replace this machine with a brand new one by Thursday 12th Nov, with a fresh warranty. The cynic is me is waiting for the next curve ball. UPDATE 2: Siemens replaced the machine yesterday 9th Nov and got around installing it the same day, a good 3 days early.
